chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-597 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.2460/2023 3. For hearing of main case 08-11-2023 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for Respondents No.6 & 7 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Niaz Hussain Rajper, XEN Irrigation Mirpur Mathelo Division.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Report of Commissioner has been received which shows that in some watercourse the water is being flown. The petitioner is getting water for irrigation of his land. XEN Irrigation Mirpur Mathelo Division further undertakes that water to petitioner’s land as per sanctioned share list would be provided. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
